package.name: go2_nl_parser
package.description: Lightweight natural-language → SemanticTask parser for the Go2 semantic navigation Phase B operator console. Reads /user_command (std_msgs/String) such as "go to chair" or "find the table" and republishes a go2_msgs/SemanticTask on /semantic_task/request. Pure regex + keyword fuzzy match — no external NLP dependency.
